subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth, that His proof might be manifest unto all the worlds and His Cause thereby revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لیکون حجته علی العالمین مبینا و لیظهر بها امره
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
